issues_resolved.change: Reduced font weights from 7 to 4 (400, 500, 600, 700), added display: 'swap' and preload: true
Added security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, etc.)
Added comprehensive SEO metadata (OpenGraph, Twitter Cards, viewport, robots)
Removed 'unoptimized' prop, added 'sizes' attribute, improved alt text fallback
Created .eslintrc.json but ESLint version mismatch detected - may need manual configuration
issues_resolved.note: ESLint shows version compatibility issues. TypeScript check passes. Manual ESLint setup may be required.

tests_failed.reason: ESLint version compatibility issue - requires manual configuration
tests_failed.impact: low - TypeScript check passes, build should work

notes: All changes preserve visual design and animation behavior
Font weight reduction keeps commonly used weights (400, 500, 600, 700)
Security headers added without changing app logic
SEO metadata added as non-visual metadata only
Image optimization changes are internal (sizes attribute, removed unoptimized)
